title: fix: hard-fail social generation and buffer staging
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Strictly Social
gist.blurb: We've tightened up our internal social media pipeline to fail fast and use our shiny new nanobanana-2 model for images.
gist.summary: Updated the internal social media generation pipeline to remove model fallbacks, switch to nanobanana-2 for images, and enforce Buffer publishing limits.
gist.impact: This ensures higher quality social posts by failing immediately on errors rather than publishing degraded content.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor robot working at a retro control panel or printing press, representing the social media pipeline. A big red button represents the 'fail-fast' mechanism, and high-quality photos represent the switch to nanobanana-2.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot working at a retro control panel with a big red button. A stack of high-quality pixel photos sits nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot working at a retro control panel with a big red button. A stack of high-quality pixel photos sits nearby.
